creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

it installs icons from other gnome-games games (even if they are not 
installed). which will conflict with gnome-games ... In addition it 
needs to conflict with the other blackjack, have a -gtk suffix, etc. I'd 
love to have this port but this submission is not clean enough to work 
with. perhaps you could get upstream to repackage it?
